creator: als@fl.net.au
text:
When trafshow is run on an ethernet interface, an error message such as the following appears:

    trafshow: SIOCGIFFLAGS: ¤Û¿¿: Device not configured

I notice on my home machine that it works fine on my tun0 interface.

Fix: 

Use tcpdump I guess.
How-To-Repeat: 
Install and run trafshow on an ethernet device on a 3.2-STABLE box.
